title: 奉命谋杀
summary:
Tina informs Micky that she received a letter from Philip, who requested a meeting to ask her a question that required only a yes or no answer, promising confidentiality. Upon arriving at the Sun Angle, Micky leaves Tina to talk to Philip while he walks in the garden to think. Inside, Tina encounters Mary, who is preparing coffee for Philip. Mary mentions that Hester is returning that day. Tina then encounters Hester on the landing, who reveals that Dr. Calgary drove her back but has since gone to Draymour.

As Tina continues toward the suite where the Dalantes live, she sees Kirsten Lindstrum approaching with a tray of coffee and cookies. Kirsten enters Philip's room and suddenly gasps, dropping the tray. Tina enters to find Philip in his wheelchair with his head slumped forward; a bright red, diamond-shaped stain is visible on his white collar. Corlston observes that Philip has been stabbed to death. Tina notices that while Philip had a pen in his hand, there is no paper in front of him, suggesting the killer took whatever he had written.

Tina and Corlston inform Leo and Gwendolyn of the murder. In the ensuing shock, Tina becomes dizzy and rushes outside to Micky, eventually fainting in his arms. Hester also collapses in shock. Micky carries Tina to Mrs. Agg's sitting room and calls for Dr. Craig. Dr. Craig arrives at the house, where Corlston confirms that Philip was murdered by being stabbed in the back of the head. Micky asks Tang to attend to the unconscious Tina.
